query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "danceopd: on-policy generative field distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the core mechanism of "generative field distillation" and "on-policy" style data synthesis (via a generative model storing dataset information) mentioned in the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (f) for being in the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster of dataset distillation and generative modeling.
